narrative_beat: Mesa de madeira com pergaminhos lacrados em dourado e etiquetas CLASSIFIED riscadas em vermelho

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: top-down view of a dark wood desk with a stack of parchment documents bearing large gold wax seals and red-crossed CLASSIFIED labels
subject.focal_point: the uppermost parchment with a gold eagle seal glowing warm
subject.secondary: Two gold fountain pens resting diagonally. No readable text on labels — only crossed red ink marks.

environment.location: a dark wooden government desk in dimly lit chamber
environment.time_of_day: midnight, single candle and amber lamp

composition.foreground: parchments and seals in rich gold and crimson tones
composition.midground: dark jacaranda wood desk with deep grain
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white antique clock striking midnight visible at edge

lighting.key_light: warm candle and lamp from upper-right
lighting.fill_light: faint amber bounce from desk surface

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
